segments.text: ADVISER: Good morning, how can I help you?
segments.translation: 顾问：早上好，我要怎样帮你？

segments.text: STUDENT: Good morning. Umm, I understand you help fix up students with host families.
segments.translation: 学生：早上好。嗯，我知道你帮助学生解决寄宿家庭的问题。

segments.text: ADVISER: That's right ... are you interested in ... ?
segments.translation: 顾问：是的……你对这个感兴趣……？

segments.text: STUDENT: Yes...
segments.translation: 学生：是的……

segments.text: ADVISER: Well please sit down and I'll just take a few details.
segments.translation: 顾问：好的，请坐，我只需要一些细节。

segments.text: STUDENT: Thank you.
segments.translation: 学生：谢谢。

segments.text: ADVISER: Right now ... what name is it?
segments.translation: 顾问：现在…… 你的名字？

segments.text: STUDENT: Jenny Chan.
segments.translation: 学生：詹妮陈。

segments.text: ADVISER: Can you spell that please?
segments.translation: 顾问：你能拼一下吗？

segments.text: STUDENT: Yes ... J-E-N-N-Y C-H-A-N.
segments.translation: 学生：好的……J-E-N-N-Y C-H-A-N。

segments.text: ADVISER: Right ... and what is your present address?
segments.translation: 顾问：好的…… 你现在的住址是什么？

segments.text: STUDENT: Sea View Guest House, 14 Hill Road.
segments.translation: 学生：海景民宿，小山路14号。

segments.text: ADVISER: OK, and do you know the phone number there?
segments.translation: 顾问：好的，你知道那里的电话吗？

segments.text: STUDENT: Yes ... I have it here, ummm ... 2237676, but I'm only there after about 7 pm.
segments.translation: 学生：是的……我这里有，嗯…… 2237676，但是我只有晚上7点以后才在那里。

segments.text: ADVISER: So when would be the best time to catch you?
segments.translation: 顾问：那联系你的最佳时间是什么时候？

segments.text: STUDENT: I suppose between 9 and let me see, half-past, before I leave for the college.
segments.translation: 学生：我想是在9.00和9.30之间，在我去学校之前。

segments.text: ADVISER: Great ... and can I ask you your age?
segments.translation: 顾问：好的……我能问一下你的年龄吗？

segments.text: STUDENT: I've just had my nineteenth birthday.
segments.translation: 学生：我刚过完我第19个生日。

segments.text: ADVISER: And how long would you want to stay with the host family?
segments.translation: 顾问：你想在寄宿家庭住多久？

segments.text: STUDENT: I'm planning on staying a year but at the moment I'm definitely here for four months only.
segments.translation: 学生：我计划待一年，但是现在我只肯定能在这里住4个月。

segments.text: I have to get an extension to my permit.
segments.translation: 我要去延期我的居留许可。

segments.text: ADVISER: You're working on it? Fine ... and what will be your occupation while you're in the UK?
segments.translation: 顾问：你正在努力吗？好的…… 你在英国的工作会是什么？

segments.text: STUDENT: Studying English?
segments.translation: 学生：学英语？

segments.text: ADVISER: And what would you say your level of English is?
segments.translation: 顾问：那你怎样描述你的英语水平呢？

segments.text: STUDENT: Umm. Good, I think I'd like to say 'advanced' but my written work is below the level of my spoken, so I suppose it's intermediate.
segments.translation: 学生：嗯。挺好的，我想说“高级”，但是我的写作水平低于我的口语，所以我猜是中级。

segments.text: ADVISER: Certainly your spoken English is advanced.
segments.translation: 顾问：你的口语当然是高级的。

segments.text: Anyway, which area do you think you would prefer?
segments.translation: 不管怎样，你认为你想住在哪个地区？

segments.text: STUDENT: Ummm, well I'm studying right in the centre but I'd really like to live in the north-west.
segments.translation: 学生：嗯，我在城中心学习，但是我真的很想住在西北边。

segments.text: ADVISER: That shouldn't be a great problem ...we usually have lots of families up there.
segments.translation: 顾问：这不应该是大问题…… 我们经常有很多家庭在那边。

segments.text: ADVISER: And do you have any particular requirements for diet?
segments.translation: 顾问：你对饮食有什么要求吗？

segments.text: STUDENT: Well, I'm nearly a vegetarian ... not quite.
segments.translation: 学生：我基本是个素食主义者……但也不全是。

segments.text: ADVISER: Shall I say you are? It's probably easier that way.
segments.translation: 顾问：我能就说你是吗？这样可能更方便些。

segments.text: STUDENT: That would be best.
segments.translation: 学生：那就最好了。

segments.text: ADVISER: Anything about your actual room?
segments.translation: 顾问：对你的房间有什么要求吗？

segments.text: STUDENT: I would prefer my own facilities - 'en suite', is that right?
segments.translation: 学生：我想要我自己的设施——“套间”，对吗？

segments.text: And also if it's possible a TV and I'd also like the house to have a real garden rather than just a yard, somewhere I could sit and be peaceful.
segments.translation: 还有，如果有可能，最好有电视，我还想要个花园，而不是个院子，一个我能坐下来静心的地方。

segments.text: ADVISER: Is that all?
segments.translation: 顾问：就这些吗？

segments.text: STUDENT: Well ... I'm really serious about improving my English so I'd prefer to be the only guest if that's possible?
segments.translation: 学生：那…… 我对于提高自己的英语很认真，所以如果可能的话，我想成为唯一的客人？

segments.text: ADVISER: No other guests ... Yes, you get more practice that way.
segments.translation: 顾问：没有其他的客人……是的，这样你能练得更多。

segments.text: Anyway, obviously all this is partly dependent on how much you're willing to pay.
segments.translation: 无论如何，很显然，这都部分依赖于你想付多少钱。

segments.text: What did you have in mind?
segments.translation: 你大概的想法是什么？

segments.text: STUDENT: I was thinking in terms of about £60-£80 a week, but I'd go up to a hundred if it was something special.
segments.translation: 学生：我在考虑大概60-80镑一周，但是如果有什么特别的，最高我可以付100。

segments.text: ADVISER: Well I don't think we'd have any problems finding something for you.
segments.translation: 顾问：那我觉得帮你找到适合你的房子应该没什么问题。

segments.text: STUDENT: Oh, good.
segments.translation: 学生：哦太好了。

segments.text: ADVISER: And when would you want it for?
segments.translation: 顾问：你想什么时候入住？

segments.text: STUDENT: I'd like to move in approximately two weeks.
segments.translation: 学生：我想大约在两周后搬进去。

segments.text: ADVISER: Let me see, it's the 10th today ... so if we go for the Monday it's the 23rd March.
segments.translation: 顾问：让我看看，今天是10号……所以如果我们定在周一，是3月23日。

segments.text: STUDENT: Yes.
segments.translation: 学生：好的。

segments.text: ADVISER: Right ... good, and if I could ask one last question ...
segments.translation: 顾问：好的……很好。我能再问最后一个问题……
